Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Phoenix]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Soulsmith ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-02-soulsmith|'''Ch 5''' — Suriel's predecessor is known as the Phoenix.}}

== Skysworn ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-04-skysworn|'''Ch 17''' — The Phoenix is choking out Yerin's perception.}}

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 3''' — Phoenixes are birds that can be found in the wild.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — The Phoenix is an advancement or concept related to reaching Monarch.}}

== Bloodline ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — The Phoenix is a sibling to the Titan.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — The people were moving toward the Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — The Phoenix is looking for Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-09-bloodline|'''Ch 17''' — The Phoenix uses wind aura to catch itself in the sky.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — The Phoenix is a being whose location is taken into account by the Dreadgods.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 5''' — A Phoenix was involved in recent events.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 12''' — The Phoenix is made of liquid blood madra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 15''' — Suriel is the Phoenix.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 3''' — Yerin holds a grudge against the Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 5''' — The Phoenix is a location that causes headaches for Heralds.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 7''' — The Blood Sage claims he can protect Yerin from the Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 11''' — The Phoenix is a biological being that the Sage of Red Faith considers a fat mutant swollen with power.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — The Phoenix is an entity that causes distress in the Hall.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 14''' — The Phoenix has the authority of a Sage.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 15''' — The Emissaries of Redmoon Hall were affected by the Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 17''' — The Phoenix is expected to destroy everyone at the location.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 19''' — The Phoenix may have sent a chunk of itself.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 24''' — Suriel can do the work of a squad of lesser Phoenixes.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 12''' — Yerin's blood madra has a minor hunger aspect from the Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 23''' — Yerin was holding out for the Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — The Phoenix uses a hammer-blow of blood and force madra technique.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — The Phoenix sends a flurry of needles at Lindon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 27''' — The Phoenix released a cloud of red poison.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Phoenixes can restore things to how they were before.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 4''' — Phoenixes can be called to write new rules or break wrong ones.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 7''' — The Phoenix would cooperate with the Mad King to heal a world.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 10''' — The people in the wreckage are waiting for their one Phoenix.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — The Phoenix attack resulted in a memorial spire of polished black stone.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — The Phoenix caused Yerin Arelius to lose her home.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
